body:
Not much improvement in `add_face_ref!`, mostly in `volume_ref!`. Previous:

![old_volume](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/3784427/129406282-efde37d9-d93e-4d43-a401-ac9b339f5f57.png)

With this PR:

![volume](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/3784427/129406330-75281d23-8277-4cff-88b4-341257c29755.png)

PS> How do I make the Y axes use the same ticks?
title: Improve performance of `bickleyjet_dg_reference.jl` benchmark
